title: Charles Schwab 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary source for business description, client assets, account scale, segments, profitability, and strategic positioning.

title: Schwab Wealth Advisory
note: Official product page for Schwab's wealth advisory offering, including service positioning, minimums, and fee structure.

note: Disclosure brochure documenting advisory program structure, limitations, conflicts, and operational terms.

title: The Charles Schwab Corporation Market Cap and Net Worth
note: Market capitalization reference near the registry snapshot date.

title: The Charles Schwab Corporation Statistics and Valuation
note: Valuation reference for current market metrics such as earnings multiple and balance-sheet statistics.

title: OpenBB GitHub Repository
note: Open-source investment research and financial data platform used as a brokerage research-layer alternative.

title: OpenBB Open Data Platform
note: Documents OpenBB's open data integration tooling and licensing posture.

title: Portfolio Performance GitHub Repository
note: Open-source portfolio tracking software used as a self-directed portfolio-management alternative.

title: skfolio Portfolio Optimization and Risk Management
note: Open-source portfolio optimization and risk-management library relevant to advisory-model decentralization.

title: Bisq Decentralized Bitcoin Exchange Network
note: Decentralized peer-to-peer bitcoin exchange example for non-custodial market coordination.

title: Bisq GitHub Organization
note: Source repository reference for Bisq's open-source exchange software.

title: Report on Distributed Ledger Technology: Implications of Blockchain for the Securities Industry
note: Regulatory analysis of DLT opportunities and risks in securities markets, used for tokenized settlement concepts.

title: Comprehensive Technical Framework for DLT Transfer Agent Integration
note: SEC-hosted proposal discussing distributed-ledger technology in transfer-agent and securities recordkeeping contexts.
